package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
)

// scenario for prepare_on_every_request_same_sql: The same literal SQL is prepared multiple times on one request path.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: data_access; severity: contextual.
type Rule285NegativeRecord struct { ID int }

func scenario285Negative(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, ids []int) (*sql.Rows, error) {
	return db.QueryContext(ctx, "select id from orders where account_id = any($1) limit 100", ids)
}
